'''Naotebe winglings''' were invented by [[Nom Anor]] and were engineered by [[Master Shaper]]s to dissolve and eat [[synthplas]] and other [[Plastic/Legends|plastic]] derivatives. They were fairly large, with white patterns on their wings that resembled [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. The [[Moth/Legends|moths]] had two distinct stages: one of a [[Worm/Legends|worm]] and one of a moth. During both stages, they could eat synthplast, and after only two weeks of maturation did they metamorphose into the mature moth stage. They could cause mild damage with their sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], and could be killed by harsh [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]] (those bred for Type I atmospheres could not survive in Type III or worse, for example).

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''
